data.title: Polygon Foundation CEO highlights advantages of holding POL amid decrease in active addresses; daily revenue hits $200K.
data.description: The daily revenue of Polygon has surged to approximately $200,000, although the number of active addresses has decreased since December.

data.title: Sentinel Real Estate appoints Ben Sanderson as Managing Director to lead UK living sector entry amid housing shortages.
data.description: In London, Sentinel Real Estate has revealed that Ben Sanderson is now the Managing Director, spearheading the company's venture into the UK living sector. Housed in Sentinel's recently established London office, Sanderson will be responsible for setting up the firm's comprehensive investment platform in the UK. His appointment comes amid a favorable investment climate in the UK, marked by notable housing deficiencies. This move encompasses various sub-asset classes, including the development of new properties to meet the increasing demand.

data.title: Ether might surge by 95% relative to Bitcoin upon confirming bullish reversal with a breakout above 0.042 BTC.
data.description: If a significant breakout above the crucial 0.042 BTC level is confirmed, Ethereum's price may potentially surge by 95% compared to Bitcoin.

data.title: US close to finalizing trade deal with Taiwan, cutting tariffs & securing commitment from Taiwanese chip giant to build more US plants.
data.description: The agreement aims to decrease tariffs and involves a pledge from Taiwanese Semiconductor Manufacturing Corporation, the leading chip manufacturer in Taiwan, to construct additional production facilities in the United States.

data.title: Dark Horse CPAs hires Shay James as Principal for strategic accounting & tax advisory. Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: A new addition has been made to Dark Horse CPAs in Cardiff by the Sea, California on January 12, 2026. Shay James has joined the team to provide strategic accounting and proactive tax advisory services for business owners. Dark Horse CPAs, known for their top-notch accounting and tax assistance to small businesses nationwide, now benefits from Shay's expertise. This move is set to enhance their services and solidify their position in the industry.

data.title: Solution Tree introduces new podcast Beyond the Pages with host Rob J. Meyer, EdD on Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: A new podcast titled Beyond the Pages with Solution Tree has been launched by Solution Tree, a prominent educational publisher and professional learning organization, based in Bloomington, Indiana. The podcast, hosted by EdD Rob J. Meyer, aims to provide insightful content inspired by the latest trends in education. This initiative is set to offer valuable resources and knowledge to a wide audience.

data.title: Jeep introduces 85th Anniversary Edition Wrangler in celebration of off-road legacy, authenticity.
data.description: A new model has been unveiled in the Jeep Wrangler Twelve 4 Twelve series in Auburn Hills, Michigan. This model marks the third edition in the series, commemorating the brand's 85 years of excellence in off-road capabilities, authentic design, and purpose-built features. The special edition Jeep Wrangler lineup consists of 12 models, with this latest release showcasing the brand's commitment to off-road leadership. This launch is part of a yearlong celebration in honor of the brand's legacy and heritage.

data.title: Aftermarket Car Telematics market report covering 6th Edition forecasts for 2024 and beyond, featuring applications like SVT and vehicle diagnostics.
data.description: A recent report, "Aftermarket Car Telematics - 6th Edition," has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report focuses on aftermarket car telematics, examining advancements in applications like stolen vehicle tracking (SVT), vehicle diagnostics, usage-based insurance, Wi-Fi hotspot, roadside assistance, and convenience applications for both consumers and businesses. The report offers 180 pages of strategic research on this market.

data.title: X is introducing Smart Cashtags to enhance social media investing, linking specific assets to tickers for accurate real-time updates. Users can expect a public release next month after feedback and testing. Smart Cashtags aim to eliminate ticker ambiguity and provide consolidated asset views on the platform. This feature will offer real-time prices and tracking for assets, creating a live investor dashboard on X, combining price data and social sentiment for both retail and institutional investors. This will revolutionize how investors track assets on social media.
data.description: X is introducing Smart Cashtags, a new feature that aims to revolutionize how investors track assets on social media. Unlike traditional tickers, Smart Cashtags link directly to specific assets or smart contracts, providing real-time price updates and a consolidated view of all mentions on the platform. This feature is currently in a feedback and testing phase, with a public release expected next month.Smart Cashtags aim to address the challenge of ticker ambiguity on social platforms where the same symbol can represent multiple assets. This feature ties each tag to a unique asset or smart contract, ensuring users receive accurate information. Once live, users can tap a Smart Cashtag to view the asset's real-time price and track related mentions on the platform, effectively turning X into a live dashboard for investors. The integration of price data and social sentiment offers potential value for retail and institutional investors.
